# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder:14b)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile that copies user-uploaded files from a mounted volume into the container for processing. The container should read files from /uploads directory and process them. Use COPY and WORKDIR to set up the file structure. This is for our file processing pipeline.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Install necessary packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl \
    vim \
    python3-pip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set working directory
WORKDIR /app

# Copy user-uploaded files from mounted volume to container's /uploads directory
COPY --from=your-base-image /path/to/uploads /uploads

# Process the files (example command, replace with actual processing logic)
RUN find /uploads -type f -exec echo "Processing file: {}" \;

# Set entry point or command for processing (replace with actual command)
CMD ["bash"]
